name: Election Out of Deemed GST Allocations

eligibility.description: Available to individuals making lifetime transfers who wish to preserve their GST exemption for other transfers with higher growth potential.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect out of the automatic/deemed allocation of GST exemption for lifetime direct skips or indirect skips to GST trusts, allowing for strategic manual allocation to more tax-efficient assets.
